decisionDrivers.title: Reviews & reputation
decisionDrivers.description: Volume, rating, and recency of Google reviews. The single strongest trust signal — and an area where EvolvE already leads most local rivals.

decisionDrivers.title: Visible results & social proof
decisionDrivers.description: Before/after content, member transformations, and testimonials. Wellness buyers want to see the outcome before they book.

decisionDrivers.title: Booking & website experience
decisionDrivers.description: Easy online booking, a clear service menu, and transparent pricing. Friction here loses ready-to-book clients.

decisionDrivers.title: Atmosphere & experience
decisionDrivers.description: Clean, calming, professional — judged largely through photos, Instagram, and reviews before a first visit.

decisionDrivers.title: Pricing & membership value
decisionDrivers.description: Intro offers, packages, and membership clarity. The path from first visit to recurring member is a pricing-and-value decision.

decisionDrivers.title: Local presence & word-of-mouth
decisionDrivers.description: Active Instagram, community involvement, and ClassPass/Groupon visibility. Local familiarity drives the first booking.
